title: Scaling State Management: Redux, Vuex, and Pinia

questions.sentence: As applications grow sharing state between many components can become difficult and lead to prop drilling
To manage this complexity developers use Global State Management libraries
In Vue Pinia the successor to Vuex offers a more modern and intuitive way to manage global state with native TypeScript support
These libraries centralize the applications data in a single Store making it predictable and easier to debug

While not every project needs a global store understanding these patterns is essential for building large scale enterprise applications where many unrelated components need to access and modify the same data consistently
